trivia_bullets.text: The flavor text explicitly names the Boros Legion, Ravnica's military guild combining white and red mana. The speaker is an unnamed soldier who joined after a single Boros defender saved their family — a foot-soldier recruitment narrative, not a named-character story.
"My family was saved thanks to a single Boros soldier. It's why I joined the Legion. I will be the protector now."

Defiant Strike is a reprint as of M21. Prior printings include Khans of Tarkir (2014), War of the Spark (2019), and Strixhaven: School of Mages Mystical Archive (STA, 2021) — the STA version includes a Japanese alternate-art variant with different illustration, one of 63 historically-significant spells featured in that supplemental slot.

EDHREC rank 5,622 as of May 2026. Legal in Pauper, where it fills the cantrip-combat-trick slot: {W} for +1/+0 plus a card draw is the baseline definition of efficient in white Pauper aggro and go-wide decks. Also Paupercommander legal.
Illustrated by Gabor Szikszai, a Hungarian fantasy artist with a long MTG credit history across multiple sets.

related_cards.note: Same oracle text, earlier art — original printing
